notes: Grouped SoC overview diagram with rounded outer frame, section containers, many rounded block tiles, and a small power-consumption legend.
Includes CPU and memory, RF, wireless digital circuits, peripherals, security, RTC, and low-power components shaded differently from normal components.
Useful for validating nested section containers, rounded rectangles, legend swatches, domain shading, tile grids, and diagrams with few explicit connection lines.
